_description: Cold open IMAGERY first (3-5s, no narration). Question lands AFTER viewer is anchored. Higher 'curiosity gap' but slower hook = potential drop-off risk.

structure.beat: Single iconic image, slow ken-burns, ambient pad. No narration.
Image cuts to second image — same scene, different angle. Still no narration.
First narration line — date + place anchor (NOT question yet).

style_notes: Higher production polish required. Cold imagery must be STRONG (iconic) or viewer bounces. Suit LEMMiNO-style content.
